summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of H4 Payroll & Payslip module. All backend APIs working (15/15 tests passed). All frontend views rendering correctly. RBAC properly enforced (sales/warehouse cannot access payroll menus). ESS MyPayslipCard integrated and working for all roles. No regression in H1 (Presensi) and H2 (Lacak Lapangan).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /hr/payroll/settings (admin) - 200 OK
Backend: PUT /hr/payroll/settings (manager) - 200 OK
Backend: GET /hr/payroll/runs (list) - 200 OK, seeded run KSC/PR-00001 found
Backend: GET /hr/payroll/runs/{id} (detail) - 200 OK, 6 payslips with correct totals
Backend: POST /hr/payroll/runs (create) - 200 OK, created KSC/PR-00002
Backend: POST /hr/payroll/runs/{id}/approve - 200 OK, status=approved
Backend: GET /hr/payslips (list) - 200 OK, 12 payslips found
Backend: GET /hr/payslips/{id} (detail) - 200 OK, gross/net correct
Backend: GET /hr/payslips/{id}/pdf - 200 OK, PDF downloaded (2658 bytes)
Backend: GET /hr/payslips/me (ESS) - 200 OK, 2 slips for admin
Backend: RBAC - Sales GET /hr/payroll/runs - 403 (correct)
Backend: RBAC - Sales GET /hr/payslips - 403 (correct)
Backend: RBAC - Sales PUT /hr/payroll/settings - 403 (correct)
Backend: RBAC - Warehouse GET /hr/payroll/runs - 403 (correct)
Backend: RBAC - Warehouse GET /hr/payslips - 403 (correct)
Frontend: Admin can navigate to Payroll Run view via sidebar
Frontend: Seeded run KSC/PR-00001 visible in list (status=Disetujui, period=2026-06)
Frontend: Run detail shows payslips table with all columns (Pokok/Tunj/Lembur/Komisi/Bruto/BPJS/PPh21/Net)
Frontend: Create new run works (KSC/PR-00003 created with 6 karyawan)
Frontend: Slip Gaji view loads with 18 payslips
Frontend: Payslip detail panel shows breakdown (Penerimaan, Potongan, Take-home, Kontribusi Perusahaan)
Frontend: Setup Penggajian view loads with BPJS rates, overtime config, PPh21 TER, PTKP read-only
Frontend: ESS (Profil Saya) loads with MyPayslipCard
Frontend: MyPayslipCard shows latest payslip for admin (Rp 14.175.000)
Frontend: MyPayslipCard shows latest payslip for sales (Rp 5.895.000)
Frontend: MyPayslipCard shows latest payslip for warehouse (Rp 4.455.000)
Frontend: RBAC - Sales does NOT see HRD group/Payroll menus (correct)
Frontend: RBAC - Warehouse does NOT see HRD group/Payroll menus (correct)
Frontend: RBAC - Sales CAN access Profil Saya (ESS) with MyPayslipCard
Frontend: RBAC - Warehouse CAN access Profil Saya (ESS) with MyPayslipCard
Frontend: No regression - H1 Presensi view loads without crash
Frontend: No regression - H2 Lacak Lapangan view loads without crash
